title: Chelan Butte — Morning Climb-out
description: The first two hours of the Chelan Butte XC: wing-up on launch, the climb out over Lake Chelan, and the first glides onto the Waterville Plateau. A shorter demo carved from the same flight.

media.caption: Wing laid out on Chelan Butte, ready to launch
Lake Chelan stretching back into the Cascades
